page_metadata.biotools__summary: DIscBIO is a user-friendly pipeline for biomarker discovery in single-cell transcriptomics. An open, multi-algorithmic pipeline for easy, fast and efficient analysis of cellular sub-populations and the molecular signatures that characterize them.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DIscBIO is a user-friendly pipeline for biomarker discovery in single-cell transcriptomics. An open, multi-algorithmic pipeline for easy, fast and efficient analysis of cellular sub-populations and the molecular signatures that characterize them.
